test_cases.test_case: Log in with valid credentials
steps: 1. Enter <valid username> in the Username field
2. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Access the application as a guest
test_cases.expected_result: User accesses the application as a guest

test_cases.test_case: View cookie usage information
test_cases.expected_result: Displays cookie usage information

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Username field blank and submit
steps: 2. Fill the Password field with <valid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Username field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Password field blank and submit
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <valid username>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with both fields empty
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Username field indicating it is required; Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with invalid Username format
steps: 1. Enter <invalid username format> in the Username field
2. Fill the Password field with <valid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is shown; Password field is cleared and Username is retained for correction

test_cases.test_case: Submit with invalid Password format
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <valid username>
2. Enter <invalid password format> in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is shown; Password field is cleared and Username is retained for correction

test_cases.test_case: Access the disabled Lost Password link
steps: 1. Click on the Lost password? link
test_cases.expected_result: No action occurs; the link is disabled

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with incorrect credentials
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <invalid username>
2. Fill the Password field with <invalid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is shown; Password field is cleared and Username is retained for correction

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long username
steps: 1. Enter a string of 200+ characters in the Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is shown indicating the username is too long or the form submits successfully with the username truncated

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in the Username field
steps: 1. Enter a username with special characters (e.g., !@#$%^&*) in the Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is shown indicating invalid characters in the Username field or the form submits successfully

test_cases.test_case: Enter leading/trailing whitespace in the Username field
steps: 1. Enter a username with leading and trailing spaces in the Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Username is trimmed; saved value shown on the Dashboard has no extra spaces

test_cases.test_case: Rapid submission of invalid credentials
steps: 1. Enter an invalid username in the Username field
2. Enter an invalid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is shown for the first submission; second submission is blocked until the fields are corrected

test_cases.test_case: Search activities in Timeline block
steps: 1. Select 'Next 7 days' from the Time Range dropdown
2. Enter <valid activity name> in the Search Field
test_cases.expected_result: Filtered activities displayed based on search criteria

test_cases.test_case: View empty state in Timeline block
preconditions: Select a time range with no activities
steps: 1. Select 'Next 7 days' from the Time Range dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Empty state message shown indicating no activities

test_cases.test_case: Filter events by course in Calendar block
steps: 1. Select <valid course> from the All Courses dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Events filtered based on selected course

test_cases.test_case: Create new event in Calendar block
test_cases.expected_result: New event creation interface opened

test_cases.test_case: Navigate months in Calendar block
steps: 1. Click the Left_Right_Arrows to navigate to the next month
test_cases.expected_result: Calendar updated to show events for the selected month

test_cases.test_case: Reset page to default in Edit mode
test_cases.expected_result: Page reset to default settings

test_cases.test_case: Add a block in Edit mode
test_cases.expected_result: Block addition interface opened

test_cases.test_case: Open full calendar link
steps: 1. Click on the Full calendar link
test_cases.expected_result: Full calendar view opened

test_cases.test_case: Open import/export calendars link
steps: 1. Click on the Import or export calendars link
test_cases.expected_result: Calendar data management interface opened

test_cases.test_case: Leave Sort Order dropdown blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Sort Order dropdown blank
2. Select a value in the Time Range dropdown
3. Enter a search term in the Search Field
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Sort Order field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Search Field blank and submit
steps: 2. Select a value in the Sort Order dropdown
3. Select a value in the Time Range dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Search Field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to filter events without selecting a course
steps: 1. Leave the All Courses dropdown blank
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the All Courses field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to create a new event without entering required details
test_cases.expected_result: New event creation interface does not open; error shown indicating required fields must be filled

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to navigate months without any events
steps: 1. Click the left/right arrows to navigate months
test_cases.expected_result: Calendar remains unchanged; no events displayed for the selected month

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to reset page in Edit mode without making changes
test_cases.expected_result: Page remains unchanged; no reset occurs

test_cases.test_case: Open full calendar link without being logged in
steps: 1. Click on the Full calendar link
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Open import/export calendars link without being logged in
steps: 1. Click on the Import or export calendars link
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Search with minimum and maximum character lengths
steps: 1. Enter exactly 1 character in the Search_Field
test_cases.expected_result: Filtered activities displayed based on search criteria; search with 1 character succeeds

test_cases.test_case: Search with one character over maximum length
steps: 1. Enter a string longer than the maximum allowed length in the Search_Field
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked; inline error message shown indicating the input exceeds the maximum length

test_cases.test_case: View empty state when no activities exist
preconditions: No activities are available in the selected time range
steps: 1. Select 'Next 7 days' in the Time_Range dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Empty state message shown indicating no activities

test_cases.test_case: Filter events in Calendar block with no courses available
preconditions: No courses are available in the All_Courses dropdown
steps: 1. Select an option from the All_Courses dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Calendar updates to show no events; appropriate message shown indicating no events for the selected course

test_cases.test_case: Star a course
preconditions: At least one course is displayed in the course grid
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card
2. Select 'Star this course' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: The course is pinned to the top

test_cases.test_case: Remove a course from view
preconditions: At least one course is displayed in the course grid
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card
2. Select 'Remove from view' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: The course is hidden without unenrolling

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to star a course when no course is selected
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Click 'Star this course' without selecting a course
test_cases.expected_result: No course is starred; an error message is displayed indicating that a course must be selected first

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to remove a course from view when no course is selected
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Click 'Remove from view' without selecting a course
test_cases.expected_result: No course is removed; an error message is displayed indicating that a course must be selected first

test_cases.test_case: Leave the search field blank and submit
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
test_cases.expected_result: The course grid displays all courses; no error is shown

test_cases.test_case: Select an invalid option in the Status dropdown
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Select an invalid option in the Status dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: No courses are filtered; an error message is displayed indicating the selection is invalid

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly star the same course multiple times
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course is displayed
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card
test_cases.expected_result: Course is pinned to the top; no duplicate entries are created

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly remove the same course from view
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course is displayed
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card
test_cases.expected_result: Course is hidden from view; no error occurs and the course does not reappear

test_cases.test_case: Search with leading and trailing whitespace
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course is displayed
steps: 1. Enter '   Course Name   ' in the Search field
test_cases.expected_result: Search results display correctly; leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed

test_cases.test_case: Search using special characters
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course is displayed
test_cases.expected_result: Search results display correctly; no error is shown

test_cases.test_case: Collapse all sections
test_cases.expected_result: All sections collapsed

test_cases.test_case: View Activities and Resources in Sections
steps: 1. Expand a section to view activities and resources
2. Click on an activity or resource name
test_cases.expected_result: Activity or resource details displayed

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Section Name blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Section Name field blank
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Section Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Activity Resource Name blank and submit
steps: 2. Leave the Activity Resource Name field blank
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Activity Resource Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to collapse all sections when none are expanded
test_cases.expected_result: All sections remain collapsed; no action occurs

test_cases.test_case: Collapse all sections
preconditions: User is on the Course Page
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are collapsed; no section names are visible.

test_cases.test_case: Add maximum number of sections
preconditions: User is in edit mode (if applicable)
steps: 1. Add maximum allowed sections to the course
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are added successfully; they appear in the list.

test_cases.test_case: Add one more section than allowed
preconditions: User is in edit mode (if applicable)
steps: 1. Attempt to add one more section than the maximum allowed
test_cases.expected_result: Attempt to add section is blocked; error message is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Enter long section name
preconditions: User is adding a new section
steps: 1. Enter a string of 200+ characters in the Section Name field
test_cases.expected_result: Section name is accepted or truncated with a visible indicator.

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in section name
preconditions: User is adding a new section
steps: 1. Enter special characters in the Section Name field
test_cases.expected_result: Section name is accepted or an error message is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Apply filters to the participants list
steps: 1. Select <attribute> from the Select Attribute dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Filters applied; participants list updated

test_cases.test_case: Clear filters on the participants list
test_cases.expected_result: Filters cleared; participants list reset

test_cases.test_case: View a participant's profile
steps: 1. Click on the First name link of a participant in the Participants Table
test_cases.expected_result: Profile displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to apply filters without any selections
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; no filters applied; participants list remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to clear filters when no filters are applied
test_cases.expected_result: No action taken; filters remain unchanged; participants list remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view participant profile without selecting a participant
steps: 1. Click View Profile without selecting any participant
test_cases.expected_result: No profile displayed; action is blocked; no change in the participants list

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly apply filters multiple times
preconditions: User is on the Participants page
steps: 1. Set a filter condition using the Select Attribute dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Filters applied; participants list updated with the latest filter conditions

test_cases.test_case: Clear filters after applying them
test_cases.expected_result: Filters cleared; participants list reset to show all participants

test_cases.test_case: View participant profile rapidly
preconditions: User is on the Participants page with visible participants
steps: 1. Click on the First name link of a participant
3. Click on the First name link of another participant
test_cases.expected_result: Profile displayed for the second participant without issues

test_cases.test_case: View Course Name 1 grade details
preconditions: User has grades for Course Name 1
steps: 2. Expand the Grade item for Course Name 1
test_cases.expected_result: Grade details displayed for Course Name 1 including 'Calculated weight', 'Grade', 'Range', 'Percentage', 'Feedback', and 'Contribution to course total'

test_cases.test_case: View Course Name 2 grade details
preconditions: User has grades for Course Name 2
steps: 2. Expand the Grade item for Course Name 2
test_cases.expected_result: Grade details displayed for Course Name 2 including 'Not graded yet' in the Grade column

test_cases.test_case: View AGGREGATION Course total grade details
preconditions: User has grades for multiple courses
steps: 2. View the AGGREGATION Course total row
test_cases.expected_result: Grade details displayed for AGGREGATION Course total including 'Calculated weight', 'Grade', 'Percentage', and 'Contribution to course total'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view grade details for Course Name 1 without proper authentication
steps: 2. Attempt to view Course Name 1 grade details
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view grade details for Course Name 2 without proper authentication
steps: 2. Attempt to view Course Name 2 grade details
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view AGGREGATION Course total grade details without proper authentication
steps: 2. Attempt to view AGGREGATION Course total grade details
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

test_cases.test_case: View grade details for Course Name 1 with exact grade value
steps: 2. Click on Course Name 1 to view grade details
test_cases.expected_result: Grade details displayed for Course Name 1 with Grade value of 85

test_cases.test_case: View grade details for Course Name 2 which is not graded yet
steps: 2. Click on Course Name 2 to view grade details
test_cases.expected_result: Grade details displayed for Course Name 2 with Grade value of '–' and feedback 'Not graded yet'

test_cases.test_case: View AGGREGATION Course total grade details
steps: 2. Click on AGGREGATION Course total to view grade details
test_cases.expected_result: Grade details displayed for AGGREGATION Course total with Grade value of 85

test_cases.test_case: Submit assignment using online text editor
steps: 2. Enter <valid text> in the Online Text Editor
test_cases.expected_result: Submission created; success message shown

test_cases.test_case: Submit assignment using file upload
steps: 2. Upload a <valid file type> in the File Upload Area
test_cases.expected_result: Submission created; success message shown

test_cases.test_case: View submission after submission is made
test_cases.expected_result: Submission details displayed

test_cases.test_case: Edit submission before due date
test_cases.expected_result: Submission edit form displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit assignment without any input in the online text editor
steps: 2. Leave the Online Text Editor blank
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Online Text Editor field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit assignment without uploading a file
steps: 2. Leave the File Upload Area empty
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on File Upload Area field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to edit submission when the submission is graded
steps: 1. Attempt to edit a submission that has been graded
test_cases.expected_result: No action buttons are visible; user cannot edit submission

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view submission when there are no submissions made
steps: 1. Attempt to view submission when no submissions have been made
test_cases.expected_result: No submission details displayed; user is informed that no submissions exist

test_cases.test_case: Submit with maximum file size limit
preconditions: User has a file that meets the size limit
steps: 2. Upload a file that is exactly at the size limit in the File Upload Area
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is created; success message is shown

test_cases.test_case: Submit with file size over limit
preconditions: User has a file that exceeds the size limit
steps: 2. Upload a file that is one byte over the size limit in the File Upload Area
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; error shown indicating file size exceeds limit

test_cases.test_case: Submit with long text in online text editor
preconditions: User has a long text to submit
steps: 2. Enter a long text (200+ characters) in the Online Text Editor
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is created; success message is shown

test_cases.test_case: Submit with special characters in online text editor
preconditions: User has special characters to submit
steps: 2. Enter special characters (e.g., emojis, unicode) in the Online Text Editor
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is created; success message is shown

test_cases.test_case: Rapid submission after redirect
test_cases.expected_result: Submission form is shown blank; no pre-filled data from previous submission

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to Activity from Assignments Section
steps: 1. Click on the activity name in the Assignments section
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to activity page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to navigate to an activity without any activities listed
steps: 1. Ensure no activities are present in the Assignments section
test_cases.expected_result: No navigation occurs; the Activities page remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Rapid navigation to activity page
preconditions: User is on the Activities page
steps: 1. Click on an activity name in the Assignments section.
2. Immediately click the back button in the browser.
3. Click on the same activity name again.
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the activity page without any duplication of navigation.

test_cases.test_case: Expand Forums section
preconditions: User is on the Activities page
steps: 1. Click on the arrow to expand the Forums section.
test_cases.expected_result: Forums section expands and displays any available content.

test_cases.test_case: Expand Resources section
preconditions: User is on the Activities page
steps: 1. Click on the arrow to expand the Resources section.
test_cases.expected_result: Resources section expands and displays any available content.

test_cases.test_case: Open profile form
preconditions: students can only modify their own profile
test_cases.expected_result: opens profile form

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with all required fields filled
preconditions: students can only modify their own profile
steps: 2. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
3. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
4. Enter <valid email> in the Email Address field
test_cases.expected_result: saves profile changes

test_cases.test_case: Cancel profile update
preconditions: students can only modify their own profile
test_cases.expected_result: exits without changes

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile with required fields left blank
steps: 2. Leave the First Name, Last Name, and Email Address fields blank
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on First Name, Last Name, and Email Address fields indicating they are required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile with only required fields empty
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on First Name, Last Name, and Email Address fields indicating they are required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access profile form without being a student
steps: 1. Attempt to click on 'Edit profile' link as a non-student
test_cases.expected_result: Access denied; user is not allowed to modify profile

test_cases.test_case: Fill all required fields with valid data and submit
preconditions: User is on the profile form
steps: 1. Enter a valid First Name in the First_Name field
2. Enter a valid Last Name in the Last_Name field
3. Enter a valid Email Address in the Email_Address field
test_cases.expected_result: Profile updates successfully; confirmation message is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Submit the profile form with one required field empty
preconditions: User is on the profile form
steps: 1. Enter a valid First Name in the First_Name field
3. Enter a valid Email Address in the Email_Address field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission is blocked; inline error message shows 'Last Name is required'.

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long string in the Description field
preconditions: User is on the profile form
steps: 1. Enter a long string of 200+ characters in the Description field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; saved value in the Description field reflects the long input.

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in the First Name field
preconditions: User is on the profile form
steps: 1. Enter special characters in the First_Name field
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission is blocked; inline error message shows 'First Name contains invalid characters'.

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly submit the profile form after a successful update
preconditions: User has just updated their profile successfully
test_cases.expected_result: Second submission attempt is blocked; only one record appears in the profile details.

test_cases.test_case: User logs out successfully
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; access to all protected pages requires re-authentication after logout.

test_cases.test_case: Unauthenticated user attempts to log out
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action is blocked; user remains on the current page; no session is terminated.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log out without being authenticated
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action is blocked; user remains on the current page without session termination

test_cases.test_case: Rapid consecutive logout attempts
steps: 2. Immediately click the Logout button again
test_cases.expected_result: Second logout attempt is ignored; user is redirected to the login page only once
